title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 644.566
text:
*644.566.  Commissioners authorized to borrow additional $2,500,000 for improvements. — In addition to those sums authorized prior to August 28, 1998, the board of fund commissioners of the state of Missouri, as authorized by Section 37(e) of Article III of the Constitution of the State of Missouri, may borrow on the credit of this state the sum of two and one-half million dollars in the manner and for the purpose of financing and constructing improvements as set out in chapter 640 and this chapter.
(L. 1999 H.B. 450) 
*This section was enacted by both H.B. 450 and S.B. 160 & 82 during the 1st Regular Session of the 90th General Assembly, 1999.  Due to possible conflict, both versions are printed here.
